news.headline: Investor alert: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP files lawsuit against ModivCare Inc. (NASDAQ: MODV), urging affected investors to contact the firm.
news.summary: In Radnor, Pennsylvania on February 18, 2025, legal representatives at Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP reported the initiation of a securities class action lawsuit against ModivCare Inc. (NASDAQ: MODV). This lawsuit is filed in representation of individuals who bought or obtained shares of ModivCare stock. More information can be found on the law firm's website at www.ktmc.com.

news.headline: Grupo Bafar (BIVA: BAFARB) releases Q4 2024 results; leading food company reports on performance.
news.summary: Grupo Bafar, a prominent player in the food industry across the country, has disclosed its financial performance for the final quarter of 2024. The company is listed on the BIVA stock exchange under the symbol BAFARB.

news.headline: New report suggests sports debt as emerging collateral for securitizations, according to Academy.
news.summary: In a recent update, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.6%, showing a significant improvement from the previous quarter. The economy also added 250,000 new jobs, surpassing expectations and signaling a positive trend in the labor market. Additionally, the stock market saw a 2% increase, with the main index reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts believe that these numbers reflect a strengthening economy and offer hope for continued growth in the near future.

news.headline: Argentinian President Javier Milei embroiled in meme coin controversy. Four individuals linked to Solana token, Libra.
news.summary: Javier Milei, the President of Argentina, is currently embroiled in a controversy involving a meme coin. Allegedly, four individuals are connected to the Solana token named Libra.

news.headline: Investors urged to contact law firm for losses in securities lawsuit against IAS Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: IAS).
news.summary: In Radnor, Pennsylvania on February 18, 2025, the legal firm Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP announced a securities class action lawsuit against Integral Ad Science Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: IAS). The lawsuit has been filed on behalf of investors who bought shares of IAS. For more information, visit the firm's website at www.ktmc.com.

news.headline: Energy Transfer LP priced $3.0 billion of senior notes: $650M due 2030, $1.25B due 2035, $1.1B due 2055 at prices of around 99% face value.
news.summary: Energy Transfer LP (NYSE: ET) announced the pricing of its offering of $650 million in 5.200% senior notes due 2030, $1.250 billion in 5.700% senior notes due 2035, and $1.100 billion in 6.200% senior notes due 2055. These senior notes were priced to the public at 99.796%, 99.872%, and 99.398% of their face value, respectively. The total aggregate principal amount for this offering is $3 billion. The sale of these senior notes is expected to settle soon.

news.headline: Gas company Orca Energy reports new reserves evaluation results for 2024.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% this year, with a significant increase in trade volumes of 8.2%. The recovery from the impact of the pandemic is expected to continue in the coming months, with global trade expected to reach $24 trillion by the end of the year. Advanced economies are predicted to grow by 4.4%, while emerging markets and developing economies are expected to grow by 6.0% collectively. These positive forecasts are attributed to increased vaccination rates and stimulus measures implemented by various governments. However, the report also highlights disparities in recovery rates among different regions, with some countries continuing to struggle with the economic fallout of the pandemic.

news.headline: Lead Real Estate Co., Ltd (Nasdaq: LRE) faces delisting by Nasdaq due to not meeting market value of publicly held shares of $5,000,000.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Lead Real Estate Co., Ltd (Nasdaq: LRE), a Japanese luxury real estate developer operating in Tokyo, Kanagawa prefecture, and Sapporo, disclosed receiving a staff determination letter on February 12, 2025, from Nasdaq. The letter informed the Company of Nasdaq Staff's decision to delist LRE's securities from The Nasdaq Global Market due to non-compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5450(b)(1)(C), which mandates a market value of publicly held shares at a minimum of $5,000,000. This action follows Nasdaq Listing Rule 5810(b) regulations.

news.headline: HYTN launches GMP Stability Program, validates vape cartridges for international markets after SNDL partnership.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on Feb. 18, 2025, HYTN Innovations Inc. revealed the launch of its GMP Stability Program and confirmed the validation of its cannabis vape cartridges for global distribution. As a frontrunner in pharmaceutical-grade cannabis manufacturing, HYTN (CSE: HYTN, FSE: 85W0, OTC PINK: HYTNF) had previously announced a partnership with SNDL Inc. on Jan. 21, 2025, to create GMP-compliant vape items. This move underscores the company's commitment to quality and compliance in the industry.

news.headline: Australia 4Q Wage Price Index Rises 3.2% Year on Year; Est. 3.2%
Australian Wage Price Index QoQ Actual 0.7% (Forecast 0.8%, Previous 0.8%)
Australian Wage Price Index YoY	 Actual 3.2% (Forecast 3.2%, Previous 3.5%)
Australia 4Q Wage Price Index Rises 0.7% quarter on quarter; Est. 0.8%
Sonoco's corrected report for Q4 2024 shows revenue of $1.2 billion, exceeding previous expectations.
Robotics startup Field AI targets $2 billion valuation: Information
Dream Industrial REIT had a strong Q4 2024, with diluted FFO per Unit at $1.00 (1.9% increase from 2023).
news.summary: Dream Industrial Real Estate Investment Trust (DIR.UN-TSX) shared its financial report for the three months and full year closing on December 31, 2024. Diluted funds from operations ("FFO") per Unit rose by 1.9% to $1.00 in 2024 from $0.98 in 2023. The company will hold a conference call on February 19, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. (ET) to discuss these financial results.

news.headline: RioCan reports strong Q4 and year-end 2024 results, with monthly distribution increase to $0.0965 per unit. Key highlights include leasing spreads of 36.7%, record-breaking occupancy at 98%, and 98% completion of expected Q4 interim closings.
news.summary: In Toronto, RioCan Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: REI.UN) revealed its financial results for the periods ending December 31, 2024. The Trust reported new leasing spreads of 36.7% in high-demand locations and a blended leasing spread of 18.7% for the year. The committed occupancy rate reached a record-high of 98.0%, with retail occupancy peaking at 98.7%. Additionally, the Trust completed 98% of the 372 expected Fourth Quarter condominium and townhouse interim closings.

news.headline: Carnival Corp & plc priced $1.0B 5.750% Senior Notes to refinance & reduce interest expenses, redeem $1.0B 10.500% notes due 2030.
news.summary: Carnival Corporation & plc revealed the pricing of senior unsecured notes to raise funds for the redemption of $1.0 billion of 10.500% senior unsecured notes due in 2030. This move was announced on February 18, 2025, without specifying the source. Carnival Corporation (NYSE/LSE: CCL; NYSE: CUK) disclosed that the proceeds from the offering of these notes would be utilized for the redemption purpose.

news.headline: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:DK) declares $0.255 quarterly dividend per share. Payment on March 10 for shareholders on record by March 3.
news.summary: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:DK) based in Brentwood, Tennessee, has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.255 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on March 10, 2025, to shareholders on record as of March 3, 2025. Delek is a versatile downstream energy firm with investments in petroleum refining, logistics, pipelines, and renewable fuels. Its refining business focuses on refineries operated in Tyler.

news.headline: Prospera Energy Inc. in Calgary, Alberta, announced CEO Samuel David's departure, effective immediately.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on February 18, 2025, Prospera Energy Inc. disclosed that Samuel David, the Chief Executive Officer, is no longer employed with the company, with his resignation from the Board of Directors effective as of November 18, 2024. Prospera Energy Inc. (TSXV: PEI, OTC: GXRFF) made this announcement regarding Mr. David's departure.

news.headline: S&P 500 reaches new high in late-day surge; 02/18/2025 closing value.
news.summary: The S&P 500 index achieved a new record high during a late-day surge on February 18, 2025. This significant milestone was reached with the index peaking at a record level. The positive movement was reported in Bloomberg's daily market roundup, "The Close".

news.headline: Analog Devices boosts quarterly dividend by 8% to $0.99 per share and authorizes additional $10 billion for share repurchase.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Massachusetts on February 18, 2025, Analog Devices, Inc., a prominent semiconductor company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ADI, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved an 8% rise in the quarterly dividend. Shareholders will now receive $0.99 per outstanding common stock, showcasing the company's commitment as this marks the twenty-first consecutive dividend increase.

TEVET appoints Gavin Lessing-Caller as Chief Growth Officer; aiming to boost sales in Aerospace and Defense Industry.
news.summary: In Greeneville, TN on February 18, 2025, TEVET, a prominent federal supplier of test and measurement tools in the Aerospace and Defense sector, disclosed the selection of Gavin Lessing-Caller as their Chief Growth Officer. This position was recently established with the aim of furthering the company's expansion strategies.

news.headline: Numinus Wellness Inc. CFO transition announced on Feb. 18, 2025. Stock symbols: TSX: NUMI, OTCQX: NUMIF, FSE: LR23.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 18, 2025, Numinus Wellness Inc., known as Numinus, a mental healthcare company, is making strides in traditional and innovative behavioral health treatments. They are specifically focusing on safe, evidence-based psychedelic-assisted therapies. Numinus is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as NUMI, on the OTCQX as NUMIF, and on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange as LR23.
